title: Syringodea hybrida
taxonomy: Syringodea hybrida is classified under the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the iris family. This classification places Syringodea hybrida among other flowering plants that are known for their vibrant, showy flowers. The genus Syringodea is native to the tropical regions of Africa, and Syringodea hybrida is a hybrid species within this genus. As a member of the Iridaceae family, Syringodea hybrida shares characteristics with other irises, such as large, showy flowers and sword-shaped leaves. This classification provides insight into the evolutionary history and relationships of Syringodea hybrida within the broader plant kingdom.
